operations.reason: DSH now derives immutable delivered-order sources from server-owned order and item snapshots. WLT owns the active fee policy, computes gross, fee, net and order count, and prevents order reuse across settlements.
activationEvidence: DSH queries delivered orders from server-owned dsh_orders and dsh_order_items
control-panel request cannot supply gross, fee, net or order count
WLT settlement policy owns fee_basis_points and currency
WLT computes gross, platform fee and partner net
wlt_settlement_source_orders locks each order_id to one settlement
settlement insertion and source-order locking use one database transaction
posting requires pending status and writes balanced multi-line ledger entries atomically
DSH-to-WLT settlement mutation path is explicit and allowlisted
control-panel exposes governed policy and order-derived creation workspace
OpenAPI and generated clients describe the governed source contract
